title: Jumpy Jumptime
description:
Alien toddler Jumpy has crashed and needs your help!
Join Jumpy on his adventure to recover his UFO wreckage, repair it and return to his home planet. Use tools like the shovel, the metal detector or the hammer and puzzle and jump through an enchanting and cozy world full of floating islands.

• Master the game through precise, skillful jumping and puzzle solving

• Enjoy classic pixel graphics powered by a modern engine

• Use tools like the shovel, hammer, metal detector or translocator to progress through the level

• Find cosmetic items and change the protagonist’s appearance

• Enjoy the cozy and relaxed background music

• Show off your jumping skills in Speedrun Mode
description_short: Jumpy Jumptime is an endearing first-person platforming game that immerses players in the excitement of exploring a world of floating islands. As Jumpy, a lovable alien who has crash-landed, your goal is to recover the scattered parts of your UFO and simply find your way back home.
